blocks.body: Reporting Passive (impersonal passive) are formal constructions for conveying thoughts, messages, rumors: It is said that..., He is believed to.... Used in news, science, official texts.

{ "title": "7. Short summary", "items": [ "Impersonal passive (It-structure): It is said/believed/reported that + clause.", "Personal passive (Subject-structure): He is said/believed to + infinitive.", "For past actions: to have + V3 (She is believed to have left).", "For ongoing actions: to be + V-ing (They are reported to be negotiating).", "Typical verbs: say, believe, think, know, report, expect, suppose, consider.", "Used in formal style: news, science, official texts." ] }
